ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A000E 'Bread and similar products' is the closest defensible parent; no specific code exists for filled chocolate lava bun.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No suitable SNOMED CT code identified for this specific filled chocolate bread product.

serving.natural_language_portion: One cocoa lava bun (approximately 100 g) is a typical single-serve portion as sold at the restaurant.

nutrient_source.title: USDA FoodData Central — Chocolate-filled sweet bread / enriched bread with chocolate filling, estimated from component analysis
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service, FoodData Central
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No exact entry exists in HPB Singapore Foodo or USDA FoodData Central for a cocoa lava bun with Magnum chocolate coating and hazelnut crunch. Nutrient values are estimated by component-weighted analysis using USDA FoodData Central reference entries: (1) Bread, sweet, enriched (FDC ID 172686) for the sponge bread base; (2) Candies, chocolate, dark (FDC ID 170272) for the ganache and Magnum coating component; (3) Nuts, hazelnuts (FDC ID 170581) for the hazelnut crunch component. Approximate composition assumed: 60% enriched sweet bread dough, 30% chocolate ganache/coating, 10% hazelnut crunch. Values are estimates and should be verified against laboratory analysis or manufacturer data.

gi_source.title: Glycemic index of sweet breads and chocolate-enriched baked goods — analogous estimate based on 'Bread, white, enriched' and 'Chocolate cake' reference values from the University of Sydney GI Database
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for cocoa lava bun with Magnum coating. GI estimated at 65 (medium) based on analogous foods from the University of Sydney GI Database: enriched white bread (GI ~70–75) and chocolate cake with icing (GI ~38–54). The sponge dough base contributes a higher GI component while the substantial fat and protein content from chocolate ganache, Magnum coating, and hazelnut crunch significantly blunts the glycemic response. A blended GI of approximately 65 is defensible for this composite product. Glycemic load per 100 g serving = (65 × 50.5) / 100 = 32.8.

hypertension.key_factor: Moderate sodium content (~210 mg/100 g) and high energy density from saturated fat and sugar
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit portion size to half a bun and avoid pairing with other high-sodium foods, as the moderate sodium content combined with high caloric density may contribute to cardiovascular strain.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High refined carbohydrate and sugar content (~50.5 g carbohydrate, ~24 g sugar per 100 g) with medium glycemic index of 65
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should treat this item as an occasional indulgence only; the high sugar and refined carbohydrate load combined with a medium GI of 65 will produce a significant postprandial glucose rise, and a glycemic load of approximately 32.8 per serving exceeds recommended single-meal GL targets.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High saturated fat (~9.8 g/100 g), trans fat (~0.2 g/100 g), and high sugar content contributing to atherogenic lipid profile
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should avoid or strictly limit consumption of this product due to its high saturated fat and added sugar content, which may adversely affect LDL cholesterol levels and contribute to endothelial dysfunction.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Cocoa Lava Bun with Magnum Chocolate and Hazelnut Crunch is a premium filled sweet bread originating from RUXU (入续 糖水铺与包), a Singaporean Chinese dessert and bread specialty shop. It is prepared using the sponge dough method, which involves a two-stage fermentation process that develops a rich, pillowy, and tender crumb structure in the chocolate-infused bread base. The bun is filled with a luscious warm chocolate ganache centre that flows when broken open, creating the signature 'lava' effect. The exterior is coated with a crunchy Magnum-style chocolate shell, sprinkled with chocolate-coated hazelnuts for textural contrast, and finished with a dusting of fine cocoa powder. The flavour profile is intensely chocolatey with a balance of bittersweet cocoa, rich dairy fat from the ganache, and nutty hazelnut notes. Nutritionally, this is a calorie-dense, high-fat, high-sugar baked product (~390 kcal/100 g) with approximately 18.5 g fat (of which ~9.8 g is saturated), 50.5 g carbohydrate, and 24 g sugar per 100 g. The medium glycemic index (~65) and high glycemic load (~32.8 per serving) make it unsuitable for regular consumption by individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes, cardiovascular disease, or weight. It contains gluten, dairy, eggs, and tree nuts (hazelnuts) and is not suitable for vegans. This item is best enjoyed as an occasional indulgence and is a signature item at the Funan Mall outlet of RUXU in Singapore.

confidence_reason: No exact entry for this specific product was found in HPB Singapore Foodo or USDA FoodData Central. Nutrient values are estimated by component-weighted analysis using USDA FoodData Central reference entries for enriched sweet bread, dark chocolate, and hazelnuts. GI is an analogous estimate from the University of Sydney GI Database. Confidence is medium because the estimation methodology is transparent and defensible but has not been validated against laboratory analysis of the actual product.
notes: Nutrient values are component-weighted estimates derived from USDA FoodData Central reference entries (enriched sweet bread ~60%, chocolate ganache/coating ~30%, hazelnut crunch ~10%) and have not been verified against manufacturer or laboratory data. Vitamin D is -1 as it is not reliably reported for this food category in the reference sources used. Selenium is -1 as it is not reported in the component reference entries used for estimation. GI of 65 is an analogous estimate; the actual GI may vary depending on the specific formulation of the ganache, Magnum coating, and bread dough used by RUXU. Halal status is listed as false because it cannot be confirmed from available public information; consumers should verify directly with the restaurant. The description in the input record was truncated; full ingredient list was not available. Trans fat of 0.2 g/100 g is estimated from the chocolate coating component and may vary by formulation.
